final:
module RefModule (
    input CLK,
    input CLR,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (CLR) begin
            Q <= 4'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
